nasb.text: When she brought them to him to eat, he took hold of her and said to her, “Come, lie with me, my sister.”

esv.text: But when she brought them near him to eat, he took hold of her and said to her, “Come, lie with me, my sister.”

cnv.text: 他瑪上到他面前，給他吃的時候，暗嫩卻拉住她，對她說：“妹妹，來與我同寢吧！”

ccb.text: 服侍他吃饼，暗嫩却抓住她，说：“妹妹，与我同寝吧！”
